name: S&w Tropical Garden Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup S&W Vintage Lites Mango Key Lime Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine salad greens with grapes, walnuts, celery, onion, coconut, and Mandarin Oranges.
2. Drizzle Vintage Lites Mango Key Lime Vinegar over the salad.
3. Toss well to coat everything evenly.
